fields.summary: Add non-exclusive node label API to RMAdmin protocol and NodeLabelsManager
(Clone of YARN-796) Allow for (admin) labels on nodes and resource-requests

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A task that needs to be done.

fields.description: As described in YARN-3214 (see design doc attached to that JIRA), we need add non-exclusive node label RMAdmin API and CLI implementation.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

Done

There're some renames, so we cannot revert RMNodeLabelsMgr changes.
